prompt: Create a cinematic 16:9 corporate promotional banner for a regional Japanese business adopting AI. Show a realistic evening twilight cityscape in a quiet local industrial town, viewed from a slightly elevated roadside perspective. On the left foreground, place a modern three-story office/factory building with warm illuminated windows, glass entrance, small landscaped trees, and a glowing exterior sign reading 〇〇工業株式会社. The middle and right background should show low residential and industrial buildings, streetlights, a few car headlights on curved roads, distant town lights, and layered dark mountain silhouettes beneath a deep blue-to-orange sunset sky with scattered clouds. Overlay elegant white Japanese Mincho-style serif typography centered in the upper half: large headline 地方企業にこそ、AIを。, with thin horizontal divider lines above and below the headline area, and a smaller centered subtitle beneath it reading まずは1業務から、無理なく始める. Use a calm, trustworthy, premium consulting-ad atmosphere, photorealistic lighting, high dynamic range, crisp building details, soft dusk gradients, balanced negative space for the text, no people, no clutter, professional Japanese corporate advertising design.
